testcase.name: test_login_with_valid_credentials
test_auth_me_with_token
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration_14.py:125: in test_auth_me_with_token token = login_response.json()["session_token"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'session_token'
